pr_title: Add Fibonacci helper for the pricing-tier lookup table
pr_description: Adds fibonacci() to compute the n-th Fibonacci number used to derive pricing-tier thresholds.
injected_issue: fibonacci() is naive double recursion with no memoization, giving O(2^n) time complexity -- fine for n=5 or n=10 but catastrophic (and eventually recursion-limit-breaking) for the larger n values a pricing-tier table would realistically need.
why_tests_dont_catch_it: Both tests only call fibonacci() with n<=10, which returns instantly even with exponential complexity, so no test times out or reveals the blow-up at realistic n.
